name: Kinetic Grand Championship
venue_name: Arcata Plaza to Ferndale Main Street
description: The World Championship Kinetic Grand Championship is a 42-mile, 3-day human-powered amphibious all-terrain kinetic sculpture race held annually over Memorial Day weekend in Humboldt County, CA. Originated in Ferndale in 1969 by sculptor Hobart Brown.

name: AVAM East Coast Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: The AVAM East Coast Kinetic Sculpture Race in Baltimore is a 15-mile single-day race through urban Baltimore, the harbor, sand, and mud. Started in 1999 by AVAM in partnership with Hobart Brown. Held first Saturday in May.

name: Menagerie in Motion Kinetic Derby
description: The Menagerie in Motion Kinetic Derby in Gainesville, FL — Southeast's first kinetic sculpture derby, started 2016. Occurs annually on the last weekend in February to coincide with Chimera Fest.

name: Lowell Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: New England's Lowell Kinetic Sculpture Race — sculptures race through streets, a giant mud pit, and navigate the Merrimack River. Held the third weekend of September.

name: The Great Port Townsend Bay Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Kinetic sculpture race held in Port Townsend, Washington.

name: Da Vinci Days Kinetic Sculpture Race
start_date: Annual (part of Da Vinci Days festival)
description: Kinetic sculpture race held as part of Da Vinci Days festival in Corvallis, Oregon.

name: Ventura Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Kinetic sculpture race in Ventura, California. Benefits the Turning Point Foundation.

name: Philadelphia Kinetic Sculpture Derby
description: Kinetic sculpture derby held as part of the Trenton Avenue arts festival in the Kensington neighborhood of Philadelphia, PA.

name: Gizmotion Celebration of Creativity
description: Gizmotion Celebration of Creativity kinetic sculpture race/challenge held in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho.

name: Geraldton Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Former kinetic sculpture race in Geraldton, Western Australia. Now inactive.

name: Prescott Valley Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Former kinetic sculpture race in Prescott Valley, Arizona. Now inactive.

name: Clearlake Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Former kinetic sculpture race in Clearlake, California. Now inactive.

name: Poland Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Former kinetic sculpture race held in Poland. Now inactive.

name: Longmont Kinetics
description: Longmont Kinetics kinetic sculpture race in Longmont, Colorado.

name: Papio Kinetic Sculpture Parade
description: Papio Kinetic Sculpture Parade in Key West, Florida.

name: Rockland Sculpture Race
description: Rockland Sculpture Race in Rockland, Massachusetts. 2024 race held June 22.

name: Canberra Kinetic Sculpture Race
description: Canberra Kinetic Sculpture Race in Canberra, Australia.

name: Klamath Kinetic Challenge
description: Klamath Kinetic Challenge in Klamath Falls, Oregon. Held the last full weekend in June.

name: People's Sculpture Racing
description: People's Sculpture Racing — kinetic sculpture race organization.
